name: Install Macos
description: Bootstrap Homebrew and the core Forge Kit CLI stack on macOS. Use on a fresh machine or to repair drift; recommended for developer Macs with admin access and network access.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Install macOS
pt-BR.description: Faz bootstrap do Homebrew e da stack principal de CLI do Forge Kit no macOS. Use em máquinas novas ou para corrigir drift; recomendado para Macs de desenvolvimento com acesso administrativo e rede.
